prompt: We're going to make a picture! First, add an object — tap the plus button.
Start building — add your first object!
feedback: One thing in your scene! What will it be?
Your first piece — what are you making?

prompt: Add another — what else belongs in your picture?
What will you put in next?
feedback: Two things now! Your picture is growing.

prompt: One more to finish — add a third object.
Add one more thing to your scene!
feedback: Three things! Now drag them where you want.
A scene with three things — now arrange them!

prompt: Drag them around to arrange your scene — put everything just where you want it.
Move things into the perfect spot!
feedback: Beautiful! You made that all by yourself.
